---
title: "data_wrangle_pt2"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Averaging quarterly data into annual data.

library(tidyverse)

raw_gdp <- read.csv("App Workflow/data/API_NY.GDP.PCAP.CD_DS2_en_csv_v2_46.csv", header = TRUE, na.strings = "")
countries <- c("Austria", "Belgium", "Bulgaria", "Croatia", "Cyrpus", "Czechia", "Denmark", "Estonia", "Finland", "France", "Germany", "Greece", "Hungary", "Ireland", "Italy", "Latvia", "Lithuania", "Luxembourg", "Malta", "Netherlands", "Poland", "Portugal", "Romania", "Slovak Republic", "Slovenia", "Spain", "Sweden")
EU_gdps <- raw_gdp %>%
    filter(Country.Name %in% countries) %>%
    select(-Country.Code, -Indicator.Name, -Indicator.Code ) %>%
    gather(key = "year", value = "index", X1960:X)
    

sumtable <- EU_gdps %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
      summarize(avr_gdp =
              mean(index, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(EU_gdps) <- tolower(colnames(EU_gdps))
 

summary(EU_gdps)

raw_labor <- read.csv("App Workflow/data/ECB_Data Portal_20260316215613.csv", header = TRUE)


raw_labor$TIME.PERIOD <- gsub("Q\\d", "", raw_labor$TIME.PERIOD)

sumlabor <- raw_labor %>%
  group_by(TIME.PERIOD) %>%
    summarize(quarter_avr =
                mean(Labour.Productivity..per.hours.worked...index..MNA.Q.Y.I9.W0.S1.S1._Z.LPR_HW._Z.OTQ._Z.IX.LR.N.))

```
